## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Change Level

- [ ] Level 0 - Documentation or comments only
- [ ] Level 1 - Local implementation change
- [ ] Level 2 - Shared behavior, CLI, config, or CI behavior
- [ ] Level 3 - Security, data, payment, or AI governance behavior
- [ ] Level 4 - Deployment, infrastructure, release, or production operation

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run release:check -- --allow-dirty`
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, config, templates, or release process changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private runner output, customer data, or production URLs added

## Notes

Record follow-up work or owner decisions here.
